if.test: TOTAL_COUNT == null and sort_column_name != null and sort_type != null

when.test: TOTAL_COUNT == null and page != null and limit != null
TOTAL_COUNT == null and page != null and limit == null

mapper.select:
WITH series AS ( SELECT generate_series (
DATE_TRUNC(#{SERIES_TYPE}, TO_DATE(#{DATE}, #{SERIES_FORMAT})::date), DATE_TRUNC(#{SERIES_TYPE}, TO_DATE(#{DATE}, #{SERIES_FORMAT})::date) + ('1 ' || #{SERIES_TYPE})::INTERVAL - ('1 ' || #{STATISTICS_TYPE})::INTERVAL,
DATE_TRUNC(#{SERIES_TYPE}, CURRENT_DATE), DATE_TRUNC(#{SERIES_TYPE}, CURRENT_DATE) + ('1 ' || #{SERIES_TYPE})::INTERVAL - ('1 ' || #{STATISTICS_TYPE})::INTERVAL,
('1 '|| #{STATISTICS_TYPE})::INTERVAL ) AS series_time ) SELECT TO_CHAR(series.series_time, #{STATISTICS_FORMAT}) AS series_time,
COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN TPD.self_process_group IN ('SO') THEN 1 END), 0) AS SO_TOTALCOUNT, COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN TPD.self_process_group IN ('SO') AND TPD.clos_type = 'A' AND TPD.clos_status = 'Y' THEN 1 END), 0) AS SO_COUNT, COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN TPD.self_process_group IN ('ST') THEN 1 END), 0) AS ST_TOTALCOUNT, COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN TPD.self_process_group IN ('ST') AND TPD.clos_type = 'A' AND TPD.clos_status = 'Y' THEN 1 END), 0) AS ST_COUNT FROM series LEFT JOIN nia.tb_auto_treat_process_dtl TPD ON DATE_TRUNC(#{STATISTICS_TYPE}, TPD.occur_time) = series.series_time GROUP BY series_time ORDER BY series_time

SELECT TICKET_ID , CLUSTER_NO , TICKET_TYPE , TO_CHAR(TICKET_GENERATION_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TICKET_GENERATION_TIME , TO_CHAR(FAULT_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS FAULT_TIME , ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE , ROOT_CAUSE_CODE , ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN , TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT , STATUS , TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE , TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE , TICKET_RCA_RESULT_ORIG_DTL_CODE , NODE_NUM , NODE_NM , ALARMLOC , TO_CHAR(TICKET_UPDATE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TICKET_UPDATE_TIME , ZERO1_MODEL , ZERO1_ENTROPY , IP_ADDR FROM ( SELECT tc.TICKET_ID , CLUSTER_NO , TICKET_TYPE , TICKET_GENERATION_TIME , FAULT_TIME , ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE , ROOT_CAUSE_CODE , ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN , TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT , STATUS , TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE , TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE , TICKET_RCA_RESULT_ORIG_DTL_CODE , NULL NODE_NUM , NULL NODE_NM , NULL ALARMLOC , TICKET_UPDATE_TIME , ZERO1_MODEL , ZERO1_ENTROPY , NM.IP_ADDR AS IP_ADDR FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_current TC INNER JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current AL ON TC.TICKET_ID = AL.TICKET_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst NM ON NM.NODE_ID = al.root_cause_sysnamea WHERE TICKET_TYPE IN ('ATT2', 'NTT') UNION ALL SELECT ALARMNO AS TICKET_ID , NULL CLUSTER_NO , 'SYSLOG' TICKET_TYPE , ALARMTIME AS TICKET_GENERATION_TIME , NULL FAULT_TIME , NULL ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE , NULL ROOT_CAUSE_CODE , NULL ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN , NULL TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT , CASE WHEN sam.status IN ('INIT', 'FIN', 'AUTO_FIN') THEN sam.status ELSE '-' END AS STATUS , ALARMMSG AS TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE , ETC AS TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE , NULL TICKET_RCA_RESULT_ORIG_DTL_CODE , sam.NODE_NUM , sam.NODE_NM , sam.ALARMLOC , NULL TICKET_UPDATE_TIME , NULL ZERO1_MODEL , NULL ZERO1_ENTROPY , NM.IP_ADDR AS IP_ADDR FROM rca.tb_syslog_alarm_mst SAM LEFT OUTER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst NM ON NM.NODE_ID = SAM.NODE_NM ) T WHERE 1=1 AND t.TICKET_GENERATION_TIME > now() - INTERVAL '48' HOUR

SELECT T.TICKET_ID AS TICKET_ID, T.CLUSTER_NO AS CLUSTER_NO, T.TICKET_TYPE AS TICKET_TYPE, TO_CHAR(T.TICKET_GENERATION_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TICKET_GENERATION_TIME, TO_CHAR(T.FAULT_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS FAULT_TIME, T.ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE AS ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE, T.ROOT_CAUSE_CODE AS ROOT_CAUSE_CODE, T.ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN AS ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN, T.TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT AS TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT, T.STATUS AS STATUS, T.PARENT_TICKET_ID AS PARENT_TICKET_ID, T.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE AS TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE, T.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE AS TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE, T.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_ORIG_DTL_CODE AS TICKET_RCA_RESULT_ORIG_DTL_CODE, TO_CHAR(T.TICKET_UPDATE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TICKET_UPDATE_TIME, T.ZERO1_MODEL AS ZERO1_MODEL, T.ZERO1_ENTROPY AS ZERO1_ENTROPY FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_current T WHERE 1=1 AND T.OCCUR = TRUE AND T.PARENT_TICKET_ID IS NULL AND TICKET_GENERATION_TIME > NOW() - INTERVAL '48' HOUR AND T.TICKET_TYPE IN ('FTT', 'PF', 'NFTT') ORDER BY TICKET_GENERATION_TIME DESC, TICKET_ID DESC

SELECT SOP.SOP_ID , SOP.TICKET_ID , SOP.TICKET_TYPE , CASE WHEN SOP.TICKET_TYPE = 'ATT2' THEN '이상 트래픽' WHEN SOP.TICKET_TYPE = 'NTT' THEN '유해 트래픽' WHEN SOP.TICKET_TYPE = 'NFTT' THEN '장비 과부하 장애' WHEN SOP.TICKET_TYPE = 'FTT' THEN '비장애' ELSE '장애' END AS TICKETTYPE, SOP.TICKET_RESULT , SOP.STATUS , TO_CHAR(SOP.REQUEST_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS REQUEST_TIME, TO_CHAR(SOP.RECEIVE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RECEIVE_TIME, SOP.DETAIL , SOP.FAULT_CLASSIFY , SOP.FAULT_TYPE , SOP.FAULT_DETAIL_CONTENT , SOP.ETC_CONTENT , SOP.AI_ACCURACY , al.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA , al.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ , al.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA , al.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ , NODEA.IP_ADDR AS IP_ADDRA , NODEZ.IP_ADDR AS IP_ADDRZ , TC.ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE AS ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE , TO_CHAR(TC.FAULT_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS FAULT_TIME , SOP.HANDLING_ACK_USER AS HANDLING_ACK_USER , TO_CHAR(SOP.HANDLING_ACK_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS HANDLING_ACK_TIME , SOP.HANDLING_FIN_USER AS HANDLING_FIN_USER , TO_CHAR(SOP.HANDLING_FIN_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS HANDLING_FIN_TIME FROM ( SELECT ticket_id, MAX(ticket_al_id) AS ticket_al_id FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current tac WHERE 1=1
AND tac.TICKET_ID LIKE '%' || #{TICKET_ID} || '%'
AND tac.INSERT_TIME > now() - INTERVAL '7' day
AND tac.INSERT_TIME >= #{START_DATE}::TIMESTAMP
AND tac.INSERT_TIME <= #{END_DATE}::TIMESTAMP
GROUP BY TICKET_ID ) AL_ID INNER JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current AL ON AL.TICKET_AL_ID = AL_ID.TICKET_AL_ID INNER JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_current TC ON AL_ID.TICKET_ID = TC.TICKET_ID INNER JOIN nia.tb_sop SOP ON SOP.TICKET_ID = AL_ID.TICKET_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst NODEA ON NODEA.node_id = AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA LEFT OUTER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst NODEZ ON NODEZ.node_id = AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ WHERE 1=1
AND TC.TICKET_TYPE IN (#{TICKET_TYPE})
AND al.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA = #{ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA}
ORDER BY SOP.REQUEST_TIME DESC

SELECT FAULT_GB , ARRAY_AGG(FAULT_TYPE) AS CODE_ARR FROM nia.tb_sop_code GROUP BY FAULT_GB
AND USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{USER_ID} || '%'
AND FAULT_GB LIKE '%' || #{FAULT_GB} || '%'
AND FAULT_TYPE LIKE '%' || #{FAULT_TYPE} || '%'
AND REG_TIME > #{START_DATE}::TIMESTAMP
AND REG_TIME <= #{END_DATE}::TIMESTAMP
select nren_name as name, nren_id as id from resource.tb_user_organ tcc ORDER BY nren_name
SELECT port_num AS port_code , protocol AS protocol_name FROM gather.tb_default_port_number WHERE protocol IS NOT NULL ORDER BY protocol

SELECT nm.node_num AS node_num, nm.node_nm AS node_name, n.id AS sdn_node_id, pm.if_num AS if_num, i.if_name AS if_name, lt.tx_bit_rate AS tx_bit_rate, lt.rx_bit_rate AS rx_bit_rate, lt.tx_pkt_rate AS tx_pkt_rate, lt.rx_pkt_rate AS rx_pkt_rate, TO_CHAR(lt.measured_datetime , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS measured_datetime FROM ip_sdn.tb_link_traffic lt INNER JOIN ip_sdn.tb_interface i ON lt.if_id = i.id INNER JOIN resource.tb_port_mst pm ON pm.if_id = lower(i.if_name) INNER JOIN ip_sdn.tb_node n ON i.node_id = n.id INNER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst nm ON n.id = nm.ip_sdn_id::INT WHERE 1=1 AND pm.node_num = nm.node_num
AND lt.measured_datetime > #{start_date}::timestamp
AND lt.measured_datetime <= #{end_date}::timestamp
AND nm.node_nm LIKE '%' || #{node_name} || '%'
AND nm.if_name LIKE '%' || #{if_name} || '%'
ORDER BY measured_datetime DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT COUNTRY_NAME AS COUNTRY_NAME, KOICA AS COUNTRY_CODE FROM GATHER.TB_COUNTRY_CODE WHERE 1=1
AND COUNTRY_NAME LIKE '%' || #{country_name} || '%'
AND KOICA LIKE '%' || #{country_code} || '%'

SELECT IP.NREN_ID AS NREN_ID, IP.NREN_NAME AS NREN_NAME, IP.NREN_IP AS NREN_IP FROM RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN UO INNER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN_IP IP ON UO.NREN_ID = IP.NREN_ID
AND IP.NREN_NAME LIKE '%' || #{nren_name} || '%'
AND IP.NREN_IP LIKE '%' || #{nren_ip} || '%'
AND IP.NREN_ID IN (SELECT NREN_ID FROM RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN WHERE NODE_ID = #{node_id})

SELECT MAPP_SERIAL, PORT_NUM, IP_TYPE, PROTOCOL, DESCRIPTION FROM GATHER.TB_DEFAULT_PORT_NUMBER
AND PROTOCOL IS NOT NULL
AND PROTOCOL LIKE '%' || #{protocol} || '%'
AND PORT_NUM like '%' || #{port_num} || '%'
ORDER BY PROTOCOL ASC

SELECT a.node_num AS node_num, a.sdn_node_id AS sdn_node_id, a.node_nm AS node_nm, trunc(a.cpu_usage::numeric,3) * 100 as cpu_usage, trunc(a.mem_usage::numeric,3) * 100 as mem_usage, to_char(a.measured_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS measured_datetime, CASE WHEN tn.strresid IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS ai_result FROM ( SELECT nm.node_num, n.id AS sdn_node_id, nm.node_nm, nf.cpu_usage, nf.mem_usage, nf.measured_datetime FROM ip_sdn.tb_nodefactor nf INNER JOIN ip_sdn.tb_node n ON nf.node_id = n.id INNER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst nm ON n.id = nm.ip_sdn_id::INT WHERE 1=1
AND nf.MEASURED_DATETIME BETWEEN NOW()::timestamp - interval '30 min' AND NOW()::timestamp
AND nm.node_nm LIKE '%' || #{node_nm} || '%'
AND nf.MEASURED_DATETIME::timestamp >= #{start_date}::timestamp
AND nf.MEASURED_DATETIME::timestamp <= #{end_date}::timestamp
AND nf.cpu_usage <= #{cpu_usage}::NUMERIC
AND nf.mem_usage <= #{mem_usage}::NUMERIC
ORDER BY MEASURED_DATETIME DESC ) a LEFT OUTER JOIN rca.tb_nodefactor tn ON tn.strresid = a.node_num AND tn.measured_datetime = a.measured_datetime

SELECT PROFILE_NUM, PROFILE_TITLE, PROFILE_DESC, NETWORK_TYPE, PROCESSING_TEMPLATE, CONSTRUCTION_CHECK, AUTO_PROCESS_CHECK, TICKET_TYPE, PROCESS_TYPE, AUTO_RECOVERY, EMAIL_CHECK, CASE WHEN AUTO_PROCESS_CHECK = 'true' THEN '상시' ELSE CASE WHEN AUTO_PROCESS_START_DATETIME IS NOT NULL AND AUTO_PROCESS_END_DATETIME IS NOT NULL THEN AUTO_PROCESS_START_DATETIME || ' ~ ' || AUTO_PROCESS_END_DATETIME ELSE NULL END END AS AUTO_PROCESS_INFO, TO_CHAR(CHNG_DATETIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS') AS CHNG_DATETIME, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY PROFILE_NUM) AS ROWNUM, COUNT(1) OVER () AS "PROFILETOTALCOUNT" FROM RESOURCE.TB_FAULT_PROCESS_PROFILE WHERE 1=1
AND PROFILE_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{profile_title} || '%'
AND UPPER(NETWORK_TYPE) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{network_type}) || '%'
AND PROCESSING_TEMPLATE LIKE '%' || #{processing_template} || '%'
ORDER BY PROFILE_NUM

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY NODE_NUM) AS ROWNUM, node.* FROM ( SELECT TNM.NODE_NUM, TNM.NODE_ID, TNM.NODE_NM, TNM.MODEL_NUM, TNM.MODEL_ID, CODE.CODE_NM, TNM.IP_ADDR, TNM.MAC_ADDR, TNM.ADMIN_YN, CASE WHEN ADMIN_YN = 'W' THEN '사용' ELSE '미사용' END AS ADMIN_YN_INFO, TNM.PRIMARY_GB, TNM.SNMP_VER, TNM.SNMP_COMMUNITY, TNM.SNMP_PORT, TNM.LATITUDE, TNM.LONGITUDE, TNM.NETCONF_PORT, TNM.NETCONF_ID, TNM.NETCONF_PW, TNM.NETCONF_TYPE, TNM.NODE_DIVISION, TNM.VENDOR, TNM.SFLOW_IP, TO_CHAR(TNM.CHNG_DATETIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS') AS CHNG_DATETIME, COUNT(1) OVER () AS "NODETOTALCOUNT" FROM RESOURCE.TB_NODE_MST TNM LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_CODE CODE ON (TNM.MODEL_ID = CODE.CODE_ID) WHERE 1=1
AND tnm.NODE_NM like '%' || #{node_nm} || '%'
AND code.CODE_NM like '%' || #{model_id} || '%'
AND tnm.IP_ADDR like '%' || #{ip_addr} || '%'
AND tnm.ADMIN_YN like '%' || #{admin_yn} || '%'
AND tnm.CHNG_DATETIME BETWEEN #{start_date} ::timestamp and #{end_date}::timestamp
ORDER BY CHNG_DATETIME ASC ) AS node ORDER BY NODE_NUM

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS ROWNUM, *, COUNT(1) OVER () AS "PORTTOTALCOUNT" FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TPM.NODE_NUM, TPM.NODE_ID, TPM.IF_NUM, TPM.IF_ID, TPM.IF_NM, TPM.IF_INDEX, TPM.IF_TYPE, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE((REVERSE((REGEXP_MATCH(REVERSE(TPM.IF_NM), E'G[0-9]+'))[1])), 'G', ''), CAST(CAST(TPM.IF_SPEED AS BIGINT) / 1000000000 AS BIGINT)::CHAR) AS IF_SPEED, TPM.IP_ADDR, TPM.MAC_ADDR, TPM.IF_OPER_STATUS, CASE WHEN IF_OPER_STATUS = 'up' THEN '사용' ELSE '미사용' END AS IF_OPER_STATUS_INFO, COALESCE(TPM.IP_PREFIX, ''), TPM.IF_DIVISTION, TO_CHAR(TPM.CHNG_DATETIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS') AS CHNG_DATETIME FROM RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST TPM WHERE NODE_ID = #{node_id} ORDER BY IF_OPER_STATUS DESC, CHNG_DATETIME DESC ) AS port

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS ROWNUM , * , COUNT(1) OVER () AS "LINKTOTALCOUNT" FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT BL.SRC_NODE_NUM , BL.SRC_NODE_ID , BL.SRC_IF_NUM , BL.SRC_IF_ID , SP.IF_NM AS SRC_IF_NAME , BL.SRC_IP_ADDR , BL.SRC_MAC_ADDR , BL.DEST_NODE_NUM , BL.DEST_NODE_ID , BL.DEST_IF_NUM , BL.DEST_IF_ID , DP.IF_NM AS DEST_IF_NAME , BL.DEST_IP_ADDR , BL.DEST_MAC_ADDR , BL.PREFIX , BL.BANDWIDTH , BL.CIRCUIT_NUM , BL.LINK_TYPE , BL.VLAN "VLAN" , BL.TAG "TAG" , BL.LINK_DESC , TO_CHAR(BL.CHNG_DATETIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CHNG_DATETIME FROM RESOURCE.TB_BACKBONE_LINK BL LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST SP ON SP.NODE_ID = BL.SRC_NODE_ID AND SP.IF_ID = BL.SRC_IF_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST DP ON DP.NODE_ID = BL.DEST_NODE_ID AND DP.IF_ID = BL.DEST_IF_ID WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(BL.SRC_NODE_ID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{src_node_id}) || '%'
AND UPPER(BL.SRC_IF_ID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{src_if_id}) || '%'
AND UPPER(BL.DEST_NODE_ID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{dest_node_id}) || '%'
AND UPPER(BL.DEST_IF_ID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{dest_if_id}) || '%'
AND UPPER(BL.LINK_DESC) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{link_desc}) || '%'
) AS link

SELECT TUO.NREN_ID, TUO.NREN_NAME, TUO.NODE_ID, TUO.IF_ID AS NODE_INT, IF.IF_NM, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE((REVERSE((REGEXP_MATCH(REVERSE(IF.IF_NM), E'G[0-9]+'))[1])), 'G', ''), CAST(CAST(TUO.BANDWIDTH AS BIGINT) / 1000000000 AS BIGINT)::CHAR) AS BANDWIDTH, TUO.CUSTOMER_ID, TUO.EMAIL, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY NREN_ID) AS ROWNUM, COUNT(1) OVER () AS "AGENCYTOTALCOUNT" FROM RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN TUO LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT NODE_ID, IF_ID, IF_NM FROM RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST) IF ON IF.NODE_ID = TUO.NODE_ID AND IF.IF_ID = TUO.IF_ID WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(TUO.NREN_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{nren_name}) || '%'
AND UPPER(TUO.NODE_ID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{node_id}) || '%'
AND UPPER(TUO.CUSTOMER_ID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{customer_id}) || '%'
ORDER BY NREN_ID
-- select distinct if_id from resource.tb_user_organ tuo SELECT DISTINCT IF_ID, IF_SPEED FROM RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST WHERE NODE_ID = #{node_name} and IF_OPER_STATUS = 'up' ORDER BY IF_ID
